- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
    - Create an HTML workspace with `index.html`, `PRD.md`, `README.md`, and supporting files.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
    - Add `index.html`, `styles.css`, `script.js`, and documentation files.

- [x] Customize the Project
    - Build a starter web page and product requirements document.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
    - No extensions required for static HTML workspace.

- [x] Compile the Project
    - No compilation required for static HTML; verify file structure.

- [x] Create and Run Task
    - No task required for static HTML workspace.

- [ ] Launch the Project
    - Open `index.html` in a browser or live preview.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
    - Verify `README.md`, `PRD.md`, and `.github/copilot-instructions.md` exist.
